hero.title: Minory
hero.subtitle1: All Your Music Tools in One Studio.
hero.subtitle2: Professional grade precision for the modern artist.
hero.appStoreNote2: Microphone access only for tuner precision.

featuresSection.title: Everything you need to
featuresSection.subtitle: From the practice room to the stage, Minory Studio provides professional-grade tools designed for the modern musician. No clutter, just clarity.

tuner.title: Precision Tuner
tuner.desc: Accurate to 0.1 cents with a responsive strobe display. Perfect for any instrument, even in noisy environments.

metronome.title: Smart Metronome
metronome.desc: Create complex polyrhythms and save setlists. Visual beat indicators keep you locked in without the click.

chords.title: Chord Library
chords.desc: Explore over 2,000 voicings with interactive fretboards. Hear how they sound before you play.

repertoire.title: Repertoire Manager
repertoire.desc: Organize your songs into gig-ready setlists. Attach lyrics, chords, and audio notes to every track.

featuresSection.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professional musicians who trust Minory Studio for their daily workflow.
